name: Supratik Chakraborty
summary: Building AI-native enterprise SaaS platforms with a focus on admin governance, analytics, and compliance-first architectures, experienced in designing multi-tenant systems, RBAC, and Agentic AI automation pipelines.
contactMessage: Open to conversations about full-stack engineering roles, AI-integrated product development, or tackling complex enterprise challenges together.

experience.title: Trumio
points: Architected multi-tenant admin backend with RBAC, license enforcement, and policy-driven workflows for 5 enterprise customers (500+ users); reduced manual onboarding steps by 75% via zero-touch configuration
Built authorization-aware analytics services with strict tenant isolation for managerial reporting; cut report generation time by 90%+ with zero compliance violations in production

Led development of AI-powered voice interview platform with VAPI integration, real-time transcription, and ML-powered proctoring using TensorFlow.js + MediaPipe; automated feedback generation and performance scoring

Designed analytics ingestion layer integrating Google Analytics and Hotjar with schema validation, rate limiting, and fault tolerance; increased trackable user events by 3x (8 to 25+) across platform surfaces

Orchestrated backend pipeline processing 200–300 PRs and feedback records monthly with PII masking and NDA boundaries; decreased weekly review time by 50% (6+ hours to under 3) while eliminating compliance risk
Owned backend delivery for 10+ production releases with bi-weekly deployments; improved observability and rollback readiness, reducing post-release hotfixes by 50% (3–4 to 1–2 per cycle)
Led frontend performance optimization using bundle splitting, render-path optimization, and memoization; improved Lighthouse performance scores by 26% (62 to 78) on key dashboard surfaces
Initiated 40+ component design system distributed as npm package; optimized average component development time by 50% (4+ hours to under 2) for internal teams

experience.title: Reunion
points: Enhanced web scraping pipelines using BeautifulSoup to extract structured data from 20+ government real-estate portals; implemented distributed ingestion workflows with Celery + RabbitMQ processing 100+ records per run
Integrated Keycloak for secure RBAC and maintained scalable data pipelines supporting real-time property data aggregation across multiple government sources

projects.title: Chessvine
projects.description: Chess analysis product: AI game summaries, two practice puzzles per game, an interactive board, bulk PGN upload, and dashboards to review your play.

projects.title: Hirevine
projects.description: Hiring software that reads resumes like a recruiter, scores fit to your job description, and runs live AI interviews with voice—so teams spend less time on admin and more time choosing the right people.
